name: Cucumber Dip-Ada
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice the cucumber and onion.
2. Sprinkle with salt.
3. Combine garlic powder, lemon juice, marjoram, and yogurt in a bowl; mix thoroughly.
4. Fold in sliced cucumber and onion.
5. Chill until ready to serve.
6. Yield: 2 cups. 1 serving = 100 calories.
